x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: DEX survey data provides the qualitative user sentiment signal that complements device and application metrics. Without survey data, DEX AI is missing the human experience dimension needed for complete digital experience analysis.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Configure DEX surveys via dex_survey_configuration_list.do to collect user sentiment data. Survey responses provide qualitative context that DEX AI uses alongside quantitative metrics for a complete picture of employee digital experience.
